scenarios.name: viewer bootstrap
assertions: viewer session bootstrap dedupes to one request
viewer entitlements bootstrap dedupes to one request

scenarios.name: feed bootstrap
assertions: feed bootstrap uses one launches request
feed saved-state bootstrap reuses preset and watchlist cache on repeat reads

scenarios.name: search fan-out and cache
assertions: normalized duplicate search queries reuse one /api/v1/search request

scenarios.name: account bootstrap
assertions: account bootstrap reuses profile, marketing email, notification preferences, and launch-day filter caches

scenarios.name: saved bootstrap
assertions: saved bootstrap uses one preset request
saved bootstrap uses one watchlist request

scenarios.name: preferences bootstrap
assertions: preferences bootstrap keeps notification preferences app-scoped and reusable
